user_initial_prompt: build a backend for online bakery shop
tech_stack_summary: Web Development → Backend → REST → Python → Django → NGINX

Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.rationale: Enables the creation of a dynamic and interactive online bakery shop backend.
Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.purpose: Provides the necessary tools to build, deploy, and maintain web applications for the bakery.

Web Development -> Backend.rationale: Needed to manage bakery shop data and operations.
Web Development -> Backend.purpose: Handles server-side logic, databases, API endpoints for the bakery shop.

Backend -> REST.rationale: Simple and widely used for backend APIs.
Backend -> REST.purpose: Enables easy creation of API endpoints for bakery shop functionalities.

REST -> Python.rationale: Elegant and easy to use for API development.
REST -> Python.purpose: Enables rapid development of RESTful APIs with frameworks like Flask or Django.

Python -> Django.rationale: Comprehensive framework with built-in features for authentication, content management system, and database migrations.
Python -> Django.purpose: Enables rapid development and maintenance of the backend by leveraging a robust set of tools and conventions.

Django -> NGINX.purpose: to handle static files, SSL termination, and provide a performance boost
